detailText:
EDUCATION
Knox Academy
0.9 km · 11 min
walking estimate
0.9 km · 4 min
cycling estimate

The local secondary school for Haddington, set west of the town centre with sports fields nearby.

Walking route: 0.9 km · 11 min. Curated route via town-centre pavements and Meadowpark, avoiding trunk-road routing.

EDUCATION
Haddington Primary School
0.8 km · 10 min
walking estimate
0.8 km · 4 min
cycling estimate

A central primary option close to Tynebank Road and the western approach to town.

Walking route: 0.8 km · 10 min. Curated route via the westbound town route and Tynebank Road area.

EDUCATION
Letham Mains Primary
1.9 km · 23 min
walking estimate
1.9 km · 8 min
cycling estimate

A newer primary school serving the Letham Mains area on the western side of Haddington.

Walking route: 1.9 km · 23 min. Curated route via Haddington town streets and the western approach, avoiding the A1.

TRANSPORT
Market Street bus stops
0.1 km · 1 min
walking estimate
0.1 km · 1 min
cycling estimate

Town-centre stops for East Coast Buses links towards Edinburgh, North Berwick, Dunbar and nearby villages.

Walking route: 0.1 km · 1 min. Curated direct route across Market Street, not the vehicle one-way system.

TRANSPORT
National Cycle Route 76
0.6 km · 7 min
walking estimate
0.6 km · 3 min
cycling estimate

Signed cycling corridor west of town, connecting Haddington with Longniddry and the wider East Lothian coast network.

Walking route: 0.6 km · 7 min. Curated route to the west-side cycle corridor, avoiding vehicle-only detours.

TRANSPORT
Longniddry railway path
1.2 km · 16 min
walking estimate
1.2 km · 5 min
cycling estimate

Traffic-light walking and cycling route following the old railway line towards Longniddry station.

Walking route: 1.2 km · 16 min. Curated route towards the old railway path and Longniddry walking/cycling corridor.

PUBLIC SERVICES
John Gray Centre & Library
0.2 km · 2 min
walking estimate
0.2 km · 1 min
cycling estimate

Haddington's library, archive and local history hub, useful for children’s sessions and rainy-day browsing.

Walking route: 0.2 km · 2 min. Curated short town-centre walking route.

PUBLIC SERVICES
John Muir House
0.1 km · 2 min
walking estimate
0.1 km · 1 min
cycling estimate

East Lothian Council offices in the centre of Haddington, close to Court Street and Market Street.

Walking route: 0.1 km · 2 min. Curated short town-centre walking route.

EXERCISE
Aubigny Sports Centre
0.5 km · 6 min
walking estimate
0.5 km · 2 min
cycling estimate

Leisure centre with swimming, gym and classes just south of the town centre near Mill Wynd.

Walking route: 0.5 km · 6 min. Curated route via central pavements towards Mill Wynd and the sports centre.

EXERCISE
Neilson Park skatepark
0.5 km · 6 min
walking estimate
0.5 km · 2 min
cycling estimate

Open parkland, play space and skate facilities within an easy family walk from Market Street.

Walking route: 0.5 km · 6 min. Curated route through the town-centre park approach, avoiding vehicle one-way detours.

EXERCISE
Haddington Golf Club
2.0 km · 25 min
walking estimate
2.0 km · 9 min
cycling estimate

Established parkland golf course to the east of town beside the Amisfield approach.

Walking route: 2.0 km · 25 min. Curated eastbound route via the Amisfield approach rather than the A1.

SHOPPING
Tesco Superstore
0.1 km · 2 min
walking estimate
0.1 km · 1 min
cycling estimate

Large central grocery shop at Newton Port, useful for day-to-day food shopping without needing a car.

Walking route: 0.1 km · 2 min. Curated short town-centre walking route.

SHOPPING
Aldi Haddington
1.9 km · 24 min
walking estimate
1.9 km · 8 min
cycling estimate

Discount supermarket on the west side of town, well placed for a cycle or combined school run.

Walking route: 1.9 km · 24 min. Curated route via Haddington town streets and the western approach, avoiding the A1.

SHOPPING
High Street shops
0.1 km · 1 min
walking estimate
0.1 km · 1 min
cycling estimate

Independent shops, everyday errands and town-centre services are clustered a few minutes away.

Walking route: 0.1 km · 1 min. Curated short walk along the town-centre shopping streets.

FOOD & DRINK
Falko Café & Restaurant
0.1 km · 1 min
walking estimate
0.1 km · 1 min
cycling estimate

Well-known High Street café and bakery stop for coffee, lunch and family treats.

Walking route: 0.1 km · 1 min. Curated short walk along High Street.

FOOD & DRINK
Waterside Bistro
0.3 km · 4 min
walking estimate
0.3 km · 1 min
cycling estimate

Food and drink close to the River Tyne, handy for combining a meal with a short riverside walk.

Walking route: 0.3 km · 4 min. Curated route towards the river and Waterside area.

WALKS & GREEN SPACE
River Tyne walks
0.5 km · 6 min
walking estimate
0.5 km · 2 min
cycling estimate

Gentle riverside paths from Nungate Bridge, good for dog walks, scooters and short after-school loops.

Walking route: 0.5 km · 6 min. Curated route onto the River Tyne walking corridor.

WALKS & GREEN SPACE
Amisfield Walled Garden
1.8 km · 22 min
walking estimate
1.8 km · 8 min
cycling estimate

Community garden and destination walk east of town, especially appealing for weekend family outings.

Walking route: 1.8 km · 22 min. Curated route east through Nungate towards Amisfield, avoiding trunk-road routing.

WALKS & GREEN SPACE
St Mary's Pleasance
0.3 km · 4 min
walking estimate
0.3 km · 1 min
cycling estimate

Green space around the historic church and riverside, a calm pocket close to the High Street.

Walking route: 0.3 km · 4 min. Curated short route to the church green and riverside area.

HEALTH
East Lothian Community Hospital
1.3 km · 17 min
walking estimate
1.3 km · 6 min
cycling estimate

Local community hospital on Alderston Road, reachable by bike from the town centre.

Walking route: 1.3 km · 17 min. Curated route via Haddington's west-side street network, avoiding the A1.

HEALTH
Tyne Medical Practice
1.3 km · 16 min
walking estimate
1.3 km · 6 min
cycling estimate

Town medical practice area near the community hospital and western residential neighbourhoods.

Walking route: 1.3 km · 16 min. Curated route via Haddington's west-side street network, avoiding the A1.
